objective: Wire handoff package integrity validation into Local CI and reusable GitHub governance checks so structured handoff packages remain enforced after the schema bootstrap.
scope_boundary: Add Local CI Gate handoff validator trigger.
Add reusable GitHub governance-check handoff validator parity.
Require lane-claim assertion for GitHub implementation execution scopes.
Add focused tests and issue evidence artifacts.
out_of_scope: SoM packet emitter/schema reconciliation; tracked by issue #437.
PR template and closeout hook hardening; tracked by issue #436.
Package schema changes beyond CI enforcement.
research_summary: Issue #438 established the package handoff schema and deterministic validator. This slice wires that validator into existing local and reusable CI gates instead of creating a separate enforcement path.

sprints.name: Handoff validation gate wiring
sprints.goal: Make package handoff validation run in Local CI and reusable GitHub governance checks for handoff-relevant diffs.
tasks: Add a Local CI Gate blocker check for handoff package integrity.
Add reusable governance-check handoff validator parity.
Pass --require-lane-claim for GitHub implementation execution-scope assertions.
Add focused Local CI profile trigger/skip tests.
Update workflow local coverage inventory and issue mirrors.
acceptance_criteria: Local CI Gate runs validate_handoff_package.py when handoff, plan, packet, execution-scope, validation, closeout, package schema/example, or validator paths change.
Reusable governance-check runs validate_handoff_package.py for the same handoff-relevant path class and fails closed if the validator is missing.
GitHub execution-scope assertion uses --require-lane-claim for implementation scopes.
Focused tests prove local profile trigger and skip behavior.
Local CI Gate passes before merge.

specialist_reviews.focus: Existing Local CI profile, reusable governance-check, issue #438 handoff validator, and issue #435 acceptance criteria.
specialist_reviews.summary: Use existing Local CI profile checks and reusable GitHub gate steps as the enforcement surfaces; avoid downstream edits and defer packet/closeout hardening to #437/#436.

alternate_model_review.summary: Standards/CI enforcement scope requires cross-review before merge. Review artifact records the final verdict and any conditions.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Implement governance-only CI/local gate wiring, tests, workflow inventory, issue plan/scope/handoff evidence, validation, and closeout for issue #435.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run focused validation, cross-review, Local CI Gate, closeout, PR, and automerge if green.
handoff_acceptance_criteria: Local CI profile handoff validator trigger is tested.
Reusable GitHub governance-check contains handoff validator parity.
Local CI Gate passes before merge.

material_deviation_rules: If packet emitter/schema changes are needed, stop and use issue #437.
If PR template or closeout hook hardening is needed, stop and use issue #436.
If downstream repos need propagation, create downstream issues instead of editing them here.
If Sonnet worker tooling is unavailable or hangs, record the attempt and continue with Codex QA instead of blocking the CI enforcement slice.
approved_by: operator approval: proceed with next sequence
